request.label: Query Instagram Business Account
request.description: Executes GET /1027756837080088?fields=instagram_business_account using current Page Access Token

error.message: (#100) Object does not exist, cannot be loaded due to missing permission or reviewable feature, or does not support this operation. This endpoint requires the 'pages_read_engagement' permission or the 'Page Public Content Access' feature or the 'Page Public Metadata Access' feature. Refer to https://developers.facebook.com/docs/apps/review/login-permissions#manage-pages, https://developers.facebook.com/docs/apps/review/feature#reference-PAGES_ACCESS and https://developers.facebook.com/docs/apps/review/feature#page-public-metadata-access for details.

request.label: Debug Page Access Token
request.description: Inspects scopes/permissions, app, and user metadata for the Page Access Token

request.label: Query Page Roles
request.description: Executes GET /1027756837080088/roles to fetch authorized roles on the page
